blockingIssues.description: Workspace validation failed before review completion because cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads 8 reproduces a current regression in graph_relation_name_is_bound_as_identifier: Repo::<ItRecordUser>::get_record now receives string "it_record_user:x" where RecordId deserialization is expected. Validators did not fully pass for this milestone.

Review found commit 83c9d237255cc46b5b665102e286613e0f6e012f bundled unrelated .factory/validation scrutiny artifacts from other milestones alongside the intended schemaless regression, so the feature diff was not isolated to its assigned scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen rust-library-worker enforcement around isolating staged changes before commit, since the current procedure already asks workers to inspect and unstage unrelated diff but a reviewed feature still committed unrelated scrutiny artifacts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for milestone-c-store-schemaless-bootstrap found commit 83c9d237255cc46b5b665102e286613e0f6e012f included unrelated .factory/validation files despite the worker following the general diff-review steps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align rust-library-worker completion rules with actual mission expectations or enforce the full services.yaml validation suite more strictly before workers finish, because a reviewed passing feature omitted the full validation commands yet still completed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for milestone-c-strict-record-link-string-classification noted the worker skipped cargo test -p appdb --test integration_db -- --test-threads 1, cargo test -p appdb --test sensitive_compile -- --nocapture, and cargo test --workspace -- --test-threads 8 after edits.

rejectedObservations.observation: Store-wide schemaless bootstrap should be documented as shared architecture knowledge.
